program_en: B.Sc. in Interdisciplinary Data Analytics & X Double Major Programme
program_chi: 跨學科數據分析及X理學士雙主修課程

children.title: Elective Courses
children.note: Students are required to take a total of 27 units of elective courses from the area which corresponds to the 2nd Major chosen by them. 6-15 units to be taken from Group A, and 12-21 units from Group B, of which at least 12 units of courses should be from 3000 or above level (including at least 6 units of courses at 4000 level). Areas

children.title: Financial Engineering (CUHK(SZ)) Group A
children.note: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): CSC3100, DDA3020, 4210, ECE4016, ECO3121, FIN3080, 3210, 4110, MAT1002, 2001, 3007, 3280, 3300, MKT4220, STA4001 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group A: SEEM3580, 4630, 4730, STAT2006 Group B: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): CSC3050, 4001, 4120, DDA4230, ECE2050, 3001, 3050, 4010, 4011, MAT4001, 4240, MKT3020, 3030, 4030, 4040, 4120, STA3001,3005, 3020 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group B

Group A: Courses offered by CUHK(SZ): MKT3020, 3030, 4030, 4040, 4120, 4220 Group B: Course offered by CUHK(SZ): CSC3050, 3100, 4001, 4120, DDA3020, 4210, 4230, ECE2050, 3001, 3050, 4010, 4011, 4016, ECO3121, FIN3080, 3210, 4110, MAT1002, 2001, 3007, 3280, 3300, 4001, 4240, STA2002H, 3001, 3005, 3020, 4001 Students can also take the following elective courses offered by CUHK to fulfill the requirements of Group B

structure.title: 2nd Major Students
structure.note: are required to choose one of the Majors offered by CUHK or CUHK(SZ) as their second Major.
